title: SIR: 10 highlights from Supreme Court verdict
description: The Supreme Court's judgment upholding the legality of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in various States also saw the top court commenting on the extent of the ECI's powers and more.The Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and  Vipul Pancholi gave the ruling on Wednesday on a batch of petitions questioning the validity of the SIR exercise. Below are ten highlights from today's verdict in the matter. CJI Surya Ka
